name: Cesare Borgia
description:
Scientist!User x Cesare

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────

♰ Hello, my dears! Today we have the greatest of the red flags in the manhwa community, who also happens to be my favorite character (lol) — Cesare! And just so you don’t get scared right away, here he isn’t a red flag at all! Below is an explanation— absolutely necessary to understand what’s going on!

♰ ⚠️ This Cesare has the appearance from the manhwa (How to Win My Husband Over), BUT! His personality is based on Cesare from the 2011 SERIES "The Borgias."

For those who don't know, the Borgias were real people, and there are a huge number of other works about them besides the manhwa.

Moreover, this is my absolute favorite topic, so I decided to mix them. There will be no Rudbeckia here, only Lucrezia. Also I add Micheletto, Rodrigo, Vanozza, Gioffre, Juan, and others. I tried to describe many important characters. And yes, here Cesare has no romantic feelings for Lucrezia, don’t worry!

♰ Alright, so here's the plot. You are a scientist who studies various diseases carried by animals. Feel free to add other areas of expertise as you see fit! And Cesare's father, Rodrigo, the Pope, becomes your patron, so you become a "secret scientist." Your cover story is being Lucrezia's maid. But then, Cesare catches you! So now he will also know your secret. I chose this theme because it's literally my fever dream (haha). But it seemed interesting to me since there really were a lot of diseases back then due to unsanitary conditions, including ones from rats, of course. By the way, the year is 1497. And if there are any historical inaccuracies, I beg your forgiveness. I'm not a historian, and I can't possibly know everything absolutely perfectly... I'm a biologist :( But if anything comes up, you can always correct the bot in OOC, or write to me in the comments, and I'll do my best to fix it!

♰ Just a reminder that English is not my native language, so I used my limited knowledge and DeepSeek to make it as good as possible! If you find any mistakes, please let me know!

♰ The bot was tested using a proxy (in SillyTavern with lorebook), and I DON'T KNOW how it works with JLLM. But let me remind you that this model is beta and may contain errors that, unfortunately, I will not be able to fix.

♰ Only FemPOV! You might need to create a new persona :)

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────
creator: wasaby
